hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '=== AEGIS session start ===' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host ('Branch: ' + (git branch --show-current)); Write-Host 'Last 5 commits:'; git log --oneline -5; $changes = git status --porcelain; if ($changes) { Write-Host ('Uncommitted: ' + ($changes -split \"`n\").Count + ' files') -ForegroundColor Yellow } else { Write-Host 'Working tree clean' -ForegroundColor Green }; Write-Host '===========================' -ForegroundColor Cyan"
